negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: common_sense_ca1acbd1-e45e-4477-bae2-c16baca36270
prompt: A man and a black dog are featured in a misty forest trail, enclosed by tall, bare trees and enveloped in light, dense fog, creating a moody and atmospheric setting. The scene is captured in an eye-level medium shot, with a path on the left leading into the distance and grass extending to the right, ending at a cliff. The man, dressed in a black T-shirt, light long sleeves underneath, jeans, a blue headband, and a long beard, stands on the left side of the frame. He holds a stick and the end of the dog's leash in his right hand. The dog, with black fur and brown fur covering the lower part of its mouth and legs, sits in front of him, wearing a brown leather collar with a leash and a metallic chain collar above it.  The camera captures the man and dog in a series of dynamic movements. The man, with brown, waist-length hair tied back in a ponytail, slightly turns left, revealing his face. The dog follows his hand movements with its head, tapping his palm with its frontal left paw. The man leans in, placing his right hand near the dog's face, and then lowers it, pointing down to the floor. The dog lowers its body, sits up, and leans forward. The camera tilts down and slightly tilts up, returning to its random motions. The man raises his right hand and closes it into a fist, prompting the dog to sit back up. He lowers his hand, and the dog raises both of its front paws and swings them toward his right hand as it hangs low. The man stands back up, and the dog returns to its initial position. The entire sequence is captured in a cinematic style, emphasizing the natural interaction between the man and his dog amidst the serene yet eerie forest backdrop.
